CREQ_rust_catalog.title: Catalog struct holds catalogue metadata
CREQ_rust_catalog.content: The struct Catalog shall carry the catalogue name as a public field.

CREQ_rust_catalog_error.title: CatalogError enumerates catalogue failures
CREQ_rust_catalog_error.content: The enum CatalogError shall enumerate the NotFound and Unreadable failure variants.

CREQ_rust_readable.title: Readable trait exposes read()
CREQ_rust_readable.content: The trait Readable shall declare one method read() returning a String.

CREQ_rust_load_catalog.title: load_catalog loads by path
CREQ_rust_load_catalog.content: The function load_catalog shall return a Catalog populated from the given path.

CREQ_rust_save_catalog.title: save_catalog persists to disk
CREQ_rust_save_catalog.content: The function save_catalog shall return true when the write succeeded.
